components.name: Token Embedding
components.description: Convert each token into a vector of numbers

components.name: Positional Encoding
components.description: Add position info so the model knows word order

components.name: Self-Attention
components.description: Each token looks at all others via Q/K/V

components.name: Add & Normalize
components.description: Add the input back (residual) and normalize

components.name: Feed-Forward Network
components.description: Process each token through a small neural net

steps.description: Now it knows it's the 2nd token
Enriched with info from 'The' (it's THE cat)
Ready to predict what comes after 'cat'
